Name: FedRAMP 20x Key Security Indicators (KSIs) - Moderate Impact Level FRMR-0.9.42
Description: FedRAMP 20x Key Security Indicators (KSIs) Moderate Impact Level for Kubernetes environments. Generated from the FedRAMP Machine-Readable Documentation (FRMR) version 0.9.42-beta.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-ADS: Authorization Data Sharing
Requirements.Description: Determine how authorization data will be shared with all necessary parties in alignment with the FedRAMP Authorization Data Sharing (ADS) process and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Attributes.SubGroup: AC-3, AC-4, AU-2, AU-3, AU-6, CA-2, IR-4, RA-5, SC-8

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-CCM: Collaborative Continuous Monitoring
Requirements.Description: Maintain a plan and process for providing Ongoing Authorization Reports and Quarterly Reviews for all necessary parties in alignment with the FedRAMP Collaborative Continuous Monitoring (CCM) process and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-FSI: FedRAMP Security Inbox
Requirements.Description: Operate a secure inbox to receive critical communication from FedRAMP and other government entities in alignment with FedRAMP Security Inbox (FSI) requirements and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-ICP: Incident Communications Procedures
Requirements.Description: Integrate FedRAMP's Incident Communications Procedures (ICP) into incident response procedures and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-MAS: Minimum Assessment Scope
Requirements.Description: Apply the FedRAMP Minimum Assessment Scope (MAS) to identify and document the scope of the cloud service offering to be assessed for FedRAMP authorization and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-PVA: Persistent Validation and Assessment
Requirements.Description: Persistently validate, assess, and report on the effectiveness and status of security decisions and policies that are implemented within the cloud service offering in alignment with the FedRAMP 20x Persistent Validation and Assessment (PVA) process, and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-SCG: Secure Configuration Guide
Requirements.Description: Develop secure by default configurations and provide guidance for secure configuration of the cloud service offering to customers in alignment with the FedRAMP Secure Configuration Guide (SCG) process and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-SCN: Significant Change Notifications
Requirements.Description: Determine how significant changes will be tracked and how all necessary parties will be notified in alignment with the FedRAMP Significant Change Notifications (SCN) process and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-UCM: Using Cryptographic Modules
Requirements.Description: Ensure that cryptographic modules used to protect potentially sensitive federal customer data are selected and used in alignment with the FedRAMP 20x Using Cryptographic Modules (UCM) guidance and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-AFR-VDR: Vulnerability Detection and Response
Requirements.Description: Document the vulnerability detection and vulnerability response methodology used within the cloud service offering in alignment with the FedRAMP Vulnerability Detection and Response (VDR) process and persistently address all related requirements and recommendations.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CED-DET: Reviewing Development and Engineering Training
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of role-specific training given to development and engineering staff that covers best practices for delivering secure software.

Attributes.SubSection: KSI-CED-DET: Reviewing Development and Engineering Training

Requirements.Name: KSI-CED-RGT: Reviewing General Training
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of training given to all employees on policies, procedures, and security-related topics.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CED-RRT: Reviewing Response and Recovery Training
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of role-specific training given to staff involved with incident response or disaster recovery.

Attributes.SubSection: KSI-CED-RRT: Reviewing Response and Recovery Training

Requirements.Name: KSI-CED-RST: Reviewing Role-Specific Training
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of role-specific training given to employees in high risk roles, including at least roles with privileged access.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CMT-LMC: Logging Changes
Requirements.Description: Log and monitor modifications to the cloud service offering.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CMT-RMV: Redeploying vs Modifying
Requirements.Description: Execute changes to machine-based information resources through redeployment of version controlled immutable resources rather than direct modification wherever reasonable.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CMT-RVP: Reviewing Change Procedures
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of documented change management procedures.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CMT-VTD: Validating Throughout Deployment
Requirements.Description: Automate persistent testing and validation of changes throughout deployment.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-DFP: Defining Functionality and Privileges
Requirements.Description: Strictly define the functionality and privileges for infrastructure and services.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-EIS: Enforcing Intended State
Requirements.Description: Use automated services to persistently assess the security posture of all machine-based information resources and automatically enforce their intended operational state.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-IBP: Implementing Best Practices
Requirements.Description: Persistently ensure cloud-native machine-based information resources are implemented based on the host provider's best practices and documented guidance.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-MAT: Minimizing Attack Surface
Requirements.Description: Persistently ensure machine-based information resources have a minimal attack surface and that lateral movement is minimized if compromised.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-OFA: Optimizing for Availability
Requirements.Description: Appropriately optimize machine-based information resources for high availability and rapid recovery.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-RNT: Restricting Network Traffic
Requirements.Description: Persistently ensure all machine-based information resources are configured to limit inbound and outbound network traffic.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-RVP: Reviewing Protections
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of protection against denial of service attacks and other unwanted activity.

Requirements.Name: KSI-CNA-ULN: Using Logical Networking
Requirements.Description: Use logical networking and related capabilities to enforce traffic flow controls.

Requirements.Name: KSI-IAM-AAM: Automating Account Management
Requirements.Description: Securely manage the lifecycle and privileges of all accounts, roles, and groups, using automation.

Requirements.Name: KSI-IAM-APM: Adopting Passwordless Methods
Requirements.Description: Use secure passwordless methods for user authentication and authorization when feasible, otherwise enforce strong passwords with MFA for authentication.

Requirements.Name: KSI-IAM-ELP: Ensuring Least Privilege
Requirements.Description: Persistently ensure that identity and access management employs measures to ensure each user or device can only access the resources they need.

Requirements.Name: KSI-IAM-JIT: Authorizing Just-in-Time
Requirements.Description: Use a least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time security authorization model for all user and non-user accounts and services.

Requirements.Name: KSI-IAM-MFA: Enforcing Phishing-Resistant MFA
Requirements.Description: Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) using methods that are difficult to intercept or impersonate (phishing-resistant MFA) for all user authentication.

Requirements.Name: KSI-IAM-SNU: Securing Non-User Authentication
Requirements.Description: Enforce appropriately secure authentication methods for non-user accounts and services.

Requirements.Name: KSI-IAM-SUS: Responding to Suspicious Activity
Requirements.Description: Automatically disable or otherwise secure accounts with privileged access in response to suspicious activity.

Requirements.Name: KSI-INR-AAR: Generating After Action Reports
Requirements.Description: Generate incident after action reports and persistently incorporate lessons learned.

Requirements.Name: KSI-INR-RIR: Reviewing Incident Response Procedures
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of documented incident response procedures.

Requirements.Name: KSI-INR-RPI: Reviewing Past Incidents
Requirements.Description: Persistently review past incidents for patterns or vulnerabilities.

Requirements.Name: KSI-MLA-ALA: Authorizing Log Access
Requirements.Description: Use a least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time access authorization model for access to log data based on organizationally defined data sensitivity.

Requirements.Name: KSI-MLA-EVC: Evaluating Configurations
Requirements.Description: Persistently evaluate and test the configuration of machine-based information resources, especially infrastructure as code.

Requirements.Name: KSI-MLA-LET: Logging Event Types
Requirements.Description: Maintain a list of information resources and event types that will be logged, monitored, and audited, then do so.

Requirements.Name: KSI-MLA-OSM: Operating SIEM Capability
Requirements.Description: Operate a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) or similar system(s) for centralized, tamper-resistent logging of events, activities, and changes.

Requirements.Name: KSI-MLA-RVL: Reviewing Logs
Requirements.Description: Persistently review and audit logs.

Requirements.Name: KSI-PIY-GIV: Generating Inventories
Requirements.Description: Use authoritative sources to automatically generate real-time inventories of all information resources when needed.

Requirements.Name: KSI-PIY-RES: Reviewing Executive Support
Requirements.Description: Persistently review executive support for achieving the organization's security objectives.

Requirements.Name: KSI-PIY-RIS: Reviewing Investments in Security
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of the organization's investments in achieving security objectives.

Requirements.Name: KSI-PIY-RSD: Reviewing Security in the SDLC
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of building security and privacy considerations into the Software Development Lifecycle and aligning with CISA Secure By Design principles.

Attributes.SubSection: KSI-PIY-RSD: Reviewing Security in the SDLC

Requirements.Name: KSI-PIY-RVD: Reviewing Vulnerability Disclosures
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the effectiveness of the provider's vulnerability disclosure program.

Requirements.Name: KSI-RPL-ABO: Aligning Backups with Objectives
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the alignment of machine-based information resource backups with defined recovery objectives.

Requirements.Name: KSI-RPL-ARP: Aligning Recovery Plan
Requirements.Description: Persistently review the alignment of recovery plans with defined recovery objectives.

Requirements.Name: KSI-RPL-RRO: Reviewing Recovery Objectives
Requirements.Description: Persistently review desired Recovery Time Objectives (RTO) and Recovery Point Objectives (RPO).

Requirements.Name: KSI-RPL-TRC: Testing Recovery Capabilities
Requirements.Description: Persistently test the capability to recover from incidents and contingencies, including alignment with defined recovery objectives.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-ACM: Automating Configuration Management
Requirements.Description: Manage configuration of machine-based information resources using automation.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-ASM: Automating Secret Management
Requirements.Description: Automate management, protection, and regular rotation of digital keys, certificates, and other secrets.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-EIS: Evaluating and Improving Security
Requirements.Description: Implement improvements based on persistent evaluation of information resources for opportunities to improve security.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-PRR: Preventing Residual Risk
Requirements.Description: Persistently review plans, procedures, and the state of information resources after making changes to limit and remove unwanted residual elements that would likely negatively affect the confidentiality, integrity, or availability of federal customer data.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-RUD: Removing Unwanted Data
Requirements.Description: Remove unwanted federal customer data promptly when requested by an agency in alignment with customer agreements, including from backups if appropriate; this typically applies when a customer spills information or when a customer seeks to remove information from a service due to a change in usage.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-SNT: Securing Network Traffic
Requirements.Description: Encrypt or otherwise secure network traffic.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-VCM: Validating Communications
Requirements.Description: Persistently validate the authenticity and integrity of communications between machine-based information resources using automation.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SVC-VRI: Validating Resource Integrity
Requirements.Description: Use cryptographic methods to validate the integrity of machine-based information resources.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SCR-MIT: Mitigating Supply Chain Risk
Requirements.Description: Persistently identify, review, and mitigate potential supply chain risks.

Requirements.Name: KSI-SCR-MON: Monitoring Supply Chain Risk
Requirements.Description: Automatically monitor third party software information resources for upstream vulnerabilities using mechanisms that may include contractual notification requirements or active monitoring services.
